description: Anthropic Messages streaming with provider-native web_search server tools. Used to validate canonical v3 reasoning/text blocks, provider tool parts, and sources/citations behavior.

source.notes: We replay the `.chunks.txt` fixture via FakeAnthropicClient and assert canonical parts JSONL from llm_dart_ai.streamChatParts.

notes: Provider-executed tools must never be surfaced as locally executable function tool calls.
